anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.notes: Session window set to 2h (matches console reset). Weekly limit back-calculated from 65% usage = ~3.23B. Session limit ~250M for 2h window.

openai.label: OpenAI (Codex)
openai.notes: Weekly limit back-calculated from 15% usage = ~9.5B. 5h session limit 5B gives ~24% which is reasonable for dashboard.
